489 FEEL_TIRED_DSCHRG_CD FEEL_TIRED_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Feeling tired or having little energy: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient expressed that in the last two weeks they have been feeling tired or having little energy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
490 FEEL_TIRED_FREQ_ADMSN_CD FEEL_TIRED_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Feeling tired
